query: SELECT DISTINCT bl.streamerName, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM brand_livestreams bl WHERE bl.liverId = (SELECT id FROM livers WHERE name LIKE '%Ryu kyogoku%' LIMIT 1) GROUP BY bl.streamerName;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT DISTINCT bl.streamerName, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM brand_livestreams bl WHERE bl.liverId = (SELECT id FROM livers WHERE name LIKE '%Ryu kyogoku%' LIMIT 1) GROUP BY bl.streamerName;
